labels.promptPlaceholder: Describe the image you want to generate...
Describe the video you want to generate...

voiceLibrary.namedVoiceHint: This model does not accept reference-audio profiles. You can still enter a named speaker supported by its backend.

voiceLibrary.title: Voice Library
voiceLibrary.subtitle: Create and manage reusable reference voices for every installed model that supports voice cloning.

empty.title: Your voice library is empty
empty.body: Record or upload one consented reference clip, add its exact transcript, and reuse it across compatible TTS models.

noResults.title: No voices match these filters
noResults.body: Try a different search or show every language.

detail.emptyTitle: Select a voice to inspect it
detail.emptyBody: Reference audio, transcript, compatibility, and consent details will appear here.

modelSetup.title: Install a voice-cloning model
modelSetup.body: This voice is ready, but it needs a model that accepts reference audio. Choose one verified by this server.
modelSetup.loading: Finding compatible models in your galleries…
modelSetup.loadFailed: Compatible recommendations could not be loaded.
modelSetup.noneAvailable: No compatible uninstalled model is available in the configured galleries.
modelSetup.capabilityNote: Recommendations come from model capability metadata, not a browser-side model list.

api.title: API usage and compatible models
api.summary: Use this voice outside the browser or check model support
api.body: Send the profile’s stable voice URI with each speech request. LocalAI resolves the private reference audio and transcript at generation time; model YAML is not modified.
api.noInstalledModels: None yet. Install one of the server-verified models above before sending this request.
api.endpointNote: The same model, input, and voice fields also work with POST /tts.

deleteDialog.title: Delete this voice?
deleteDialog.message: “{{name}}” and its reference audio will be permanently removed. Existing model YAML is not changed.

toasts.installStarted: Installing {{name}}. Progress is available in Operations.
toasts.copyFailed: Could not copy the API request

voiceCreate.title: Create a reusable voice
voiceCreate.subtitle: Add one clean reference clip and its exact transcript. LocalAI handles the backend-specific cloning parameters at generation time.

reference.title: Reference audio
reference.body: Record in the browser or upload an existing clip. Speech should be clean, natural, and from one speaker.

details.title: Identity and transcript
details.body: Give admins a recognizable name and transcribe the clip exactly, including fillers and punctuation.

consent.title: Authorization
consent.body: Voice cloning can be sensitive. Confirm permission before this reference is saved.

audio.label: Voice reference
audio.durationError: Reference audio must be between 1 second and 2 minutes.
audio.decodeError: This browser could not decode the selected audio file.
audio.qualityHint: 6–30 seconds usually produces a stronger clone

fields.name: Voice name
fields.transcriptPlaceholder: Type every word spoken in the reference clip…
fields.transcriptHint: Match the recording exactly. Do not rewrite grammar or remove pauses and fillers.

consent.title: I confirm that this voice may be cloned
consent.body: I have the speaker’s permission or another lawful basis to store and use this recording for synthesized speech.

readiness.title: Profile readiness
readiness.body: A voice becomes available in Text to Speech when every required item is complete.
readiness.name: Recognizable voice name

privacy.title: Private by default.
privacy.body: Reference audio is stored in LocalAI’s data directory with restricted file permissions and is never exposed as a model-folder path.

labels.promptPlaceholder: Describe the sound you want to generate...

history.title: History
history.clearMessage: Remove all history entries? This cannot be undone.
